tooltip.ironbatteries.block.battery_slot:
Holds up to 2 batteries.
Can be connected to a §bNetwork§7.
Energy can also be transferred directly
to or from the block.
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.controller:
This block creates a §bNetwork§7.
A Network is used to connect
multiple batteries, ports, monitors,
and redstone links together.
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.port:
An I/O block used to transfer
energy in and out of a §bNetwork§7.
Right-click to cycle its mode
between §ainput§7 (pull), §coutput§7 (push),
or §9both§7 (passive).
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.monitor:
Displays information such as the
current energy stored in the §bNetwork§7.
Can be formed into a mega-monitor multiblock
by placing them in an NxN square (up to 32x32).
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.casing:
Does nothing on its own,
but can be used to extend the §bNetwork§7.
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.redstone_lin:
Outputs a redstone signal with a
strength proportional to the current
energy stored in the §bNetwork§7.
tooltip.ironbatteries.block.atmospheric_:
Modified lightning rod that generates
§eFE§7 when struck by lightning.
